name: EC2 Instance
description: Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud virtual server

inputs.name: name
inputs.label: Instance Name
inputs.description: Name tag for the EC2 instance

inputs.name: instance_type
inputs.label: Instance Type
inputs.description: EC2 instance type

inputs.name: ami
inputs.label: AMI ID
inputs.description: Amazon Machine Image ID (leave empty for latest Amazon Linux 2023)

inputs.name: ami_ssm_parameter
inputs.label: AMI SSM Parameter
inputs.description: SSM parameter name for the AMI ID (used if AMI ID is empty)

inputs.name: key_name
inputs.label: Key Pair Name
inputs.description: SSH key pair name for instance access

inputs.name: vpc_security_group_ids
inputs.label: Security Group IDs
inputs.description: Comma-separated security group IDs to associate with

inputs.name: subnet_id
inputs.label: Subnet ID
inputs.description: VPC subnet to launch instance in

inputs.name: associate_public_ip_address
inputs.label: Public IP
inputs.description: Associate a public IP address with the instance

inputs.name: iam_instance_profile
inputs.label: IAM Instance Profile
inputs.description: IAM instance profile name (for existing profiles)

inputs.name: monitoring
inputs.label: Detailed Monitoring
inputs.description: Enable detailed CloudWatch monitoring

inputs.name: user_data
inputs.label: User Data Script
inputs.placeholder:
#!/bin/bash
yum update -y
yum install -y httpd
systemctl start httpd
inputs.description: Startup script to run when the instance launches

inputs.name: root_block_device_size
inputs.label: Root Volume Size (GB)
inputs.description: Size of the root EBS volume in GB

inputs.name: root_block_device_type
inputs.label: Root Volume Type
inputs.description: Type of the root EBS volume

inputs.name: root_block_device_encrypted
inputs.label: Encrypt Root Volume
inputs.description: Enable encryption for the root volume

inputs.name: ebs_optimized
inputs.label: EBS Optimized
inputs.description: Enable EBS-optimized instance

inputs.name: disable_api_termination
inputs.label: Termination Protection
inputs.description: Prevent accidental instance termination via API

inputs.name: disable_api_stop
inputs.label: Stop Protection
inputs.description: Prevent accidental instance stop via API

inputs.name: availability_zone
inputs.label: Availability Zone
inputs.description: Specific AZ to launch the instance in (optional)

inputs.name: private_ip
inputs.label: Private IP
inputs.description: Specific private IP address to assign (optional)

inputs.name: tenancy
inputs.label: Tenancy
inputs.description: Instance tenancy (default, dedicated, or host)

inputs.name: cpu_credits
inputs.label: CPU Credits
inputs.description: CPU credit option for burstable instances (T series)

inputs.name: hibernation
inputs.label: Hibernation
inputs.description: Enable instance hibernation support

inputs.name: ignore_ami_changes
inputs.label: Ignore AMI Changes
inputs.description: Ignore AMI ID changes in Terraform (prevent instance replacement)

inputs.name: instance_initiated_shutdown_behavior
inputs.label: Shutdown Behavior
inputs.description: What happens when the instance initiates a shutdown

inputs.name: source_dest_check
inputs.label: Source/Dest Check
inputs.description: Enable source/destination check (disable for NAT instances)

inputs.name: create_iam_instance_profile
inputs.label: Create IAM Instance Profile
inputs.description: Create a new IAM instance profile (instead of using an existing one)

inputs.name: iam_role_name
inputs.label: IAM Role Name
inputs.description: Name for the IAM role (when creating new profile)

inputs.name: iam_role_policies
inputs.label: IAM Role Policies
inputs.description: Policy name = ARN pairs to attach (one per line)

inputs.name: create_security_group
inputs.label: Create Security Group
inputs.description: Create a dedicated security group for this instance

inputs.name: create_spot_instance
inputs.label: Spot Instance
inputs.description: Launch as a Spot Instance for cost savings

inputs.name: spot_price
inputs.label: Spot Max Price
inputs.description: Maximum hourly price for spot instance (empty = on-demand price)

inputs.name: create_eip
inputs.label: Create Elastic IP
inputs.description: Create and associate an Elastic IP with the instance

inputs.name: enable_volume_tags
inputs.label: Volume Tags
inputs.description: Apply tags to EBS volumes created by the instance
